# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

This project exists to build real, useful tools. We expect all contributors to:

- Be direct and specific — vague issues and PRs slow everyone down
- Respect the existing architecture before proposing rewrites
- Back claims with log output, query results, or benchmarks — not opinions
- Accept that not all PRs will be merged — scope decisions are made by the maintainer

We do not tolerate harassment, discrimination, or bad-faith behaviour of any kind.

## Enforcement

Issues or PRs that violate these standards will be closed without discussion. Repeated violations result in a permanent ban from the repository.

## Reporting

Contact: jinujon007@gmail.com

*This code of conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 2.1.*
